changeSet.author: thanh
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE sugar_advisor.consumptions ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), user_id UUID NOT NULL, family_member_id UUID, product_id UUID, sugar_amount DECIMAL(6,2) NOT NULL, consumed_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
CONSTRAINT fk_consumption_user FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES sugar_advisor.users(id),
CONSTRAINT fk_consumption_family FOREIGN KEY (family_member_id) REFERENCES sugar_advisor.family_members(id),
CONSTRAINT fk_consumption_product FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES sugar_advisor.products(id) );
